app_release_notes: v0.14.3 - Fixes the guided demo tour. In 0.14.2 the installed app couldn't find the bundled demo workbook, so the tour stopped with "Pick a workbook first" - now it opens the demo workbook correctly. Also restores the Loadscope logo on the Pocket Range Card and the welcome screen (same underlying cause). Everything from 0.14.2 is included: auto-launching demo tour, the cleaner Excel view that restores when you quit Loadscope, and the "Print This Workbook" buttons on the Charts and Ballistics sheets.
